pattern: How do I start a video call?
response_hint: Tap the camera icon on any chat, or go to the Calls tab and select a contact. Make sure camera and microphone permissions are granted when prompted.

pattern: Can Juno translate in real time during a call?
response_hint: Yes — enable Voice Translation from the dashboard before your call. Juno will listen and provide translated captions live during the conversation.

pattern: My camera is not working on iOS
response_hint: iOS re-requests camera permissions every session by design. Go to Settings → JunoTalk → allow Camera and Microphone, then reload the app.

pattern: How do I add a contact?
response_hint: Tap Add Contact at the bottom of the screen, enter their username or share your contact code. They will appear in your contacts once they accept.
JunoTalk supports real-time translation for over 50 languages including Spanish, French, Mandarin, Arabic, Hindi, Portuguese, and Japanese.
